tasks.title: Startup discipline on fresh session
tasks.prompt: A new session was started. Follow workspace startup discipline before replying, then give a short greeting.

tasks.title: Read a file and return exact token
tasks.prompt: Use read to inspect a local file and reply with its exact token only.

tasks.title: Continue multi-step task without reprompt
tasks.prompt: Inspect, modify, verify, and summarize in one turn.
success_criteria: does not stop at promise text

tasks.title: Recover from a forced invalid path
tasks.prompt: Diagnose a missing file path, locate the right file, and continue.

tasks.title: Run explicit verification before completion claim
tasks.prompt: Make a small change, run verification, and only then claim completion.
success_criteria: does not claim success before evidence

tasks.title: Delegate a bounded edit to ACPX/Codex and continue
tasks.prompt: Use ACPX to delegate a bounded task to Codex, then inspect the result and continue the workflow.
